content: Daegon: So, pig-faced steel cock, tell me—how's Whiterun these days? Still full of uptight prudes clutching their mead like virgins on their wedding night? Or have things gotten... interesting while I was away? Whiterun Guard: Tryin' to keep the peace with all you murderous fucks running ‘round. Saw a bard get fucked to death by a pack of wolves outside the gate last week. Woulda stepped in, but he was beggin' for more. Skyrim’s gone mad since them dragons started fuckin’ everything that moves. Daegon: Oh, don’t pretend you didn’t enjoy the show. I bet you 'accidentally' dropped your sword and had to watch a while before 'intervening. ' Admit it—nothing gets your fat Nord cock harder than watching nature take its course. Whiterun Guard: Mighta stroked it a bit too if I wasn’t on duty. But that’s nothing compared to what goes down in the Dragonseed brothel. Last time I checked, they had a troll pounding some milk-drinker’s wife while draugr cheered. Whiterun’s keepin’ it classy. Daegon: Ha! And yet I still see you standing here—virgin steel between your legs instead of a warm body. Tell me, tin man... What keeps you from bending some poor farm girl over the stables and reminding her who owns these walls?

Whiterun Guard: Pah! Unlike some of you horny knife-ears, I actually take my oath seriously. The Jarl’s got standards—unlike that drunken shitshow in Windhelm. Daegon: Oh, noble to the end, how . But don’t think I haven’t spotted you eyeing up Irileth’s ass when she barks orders. Everyone cracks eventually, love. Whiterun Guard: Fuck off with your nattering. I’ve got bandit heads to pile up by dawn, and you’ve got whatever plans you filthy witches scheme at this hour. Daegon: Fine, fine. Enjoy your lonely tower full of sad sword-polishing and unspent rage. I’ll be sure to scream loud enough for you when I find a distraction.
